headline: Disney Credit Move Highlights Liquidity, Valuation Gap And Leadership Transition
summary: Disney (NYSE:DIS) has entered into new and amended credit agreements totaling US$9.25b. The facilities are arranged with major banks and are structured to support liquidity and funding capacity. The refinancing excludes certain higher risk ventures, focusing the agreements on Disney’s core operations. The move comes as Disney prepares for leadership changes, including the planned departures of its chief executive and chief communications officer. For you as an investor, the focus is on what...

headline: Tobacco-Free Kids: Over 160 Organizations Call on Formula 1 to End All Tobacco Sponsorships and Stop Promoting Addiction to Kids
summary: As the Formula 1 racing season starts this week, over 160 public interest organizations from around the world today sent a letter to Formula 1 calling on the sport to update its prohibition of tobacco product sponsorships to include nicotine pouches and stop helping the tobacco industry market its products to F1's millions of young fans.

content.title: Tobacco-Free Kids: Over 160 Organizations Call on Formula 1 to End All Tobacco Sponsorships and Stop Promoting Addiction to Kids
content.summary: As the Formula 1 racing season starts this week, over 160 public interest organizations from around the world today sent a letter to Formula 1 calling on the sport to update its prohibition of tobacco product sponsorships to include nicotine pouches and stop helping the tobacco industry market its products to F1's millions of young fans.
